title: Transitional Shelter (TS)
text:
Transitional Shelter (TS) - SupportGoWhere
Transitional Shelter (TS)
Share link
Provide temporary accommodation and social work intervention to homeless families who have exhausted all other means of accommodation.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Fees payable
Referral required
Collapse all sections
About this support

Transitional Shelter (TS) provides temporary accommodation to homeless families who have exhausted all other means of accommodation.

It provides onsite social work intervention to address the complex needs of the admitted families/individuals to achieve long-term and stable housing.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen/ Permanent Resident

Exhausted all other means of accommodation and facing financial difficulties

Require social work intervention and willing to work with caseworkers to achieve long-term housing

Able to live independently in the community, in a communal shelter setting (i.e. does not require close supervision or nursing care)

What to expect?

Upon receiving referral, the TS will conduct an intake assessment to ensure that the applicant is eligible for the shelter.

Clients must work with the TS on case goals and intervention plans to achieve long-term stable housing eventually.

How to apply?

You may contact your nearest Family Service Centre (FSC) for assistance if you are homeless.

The TS will only accept applications from FSCs and other community agencies with social work competencies that can assess whether the family/individual meets the admission criteria.

The referring agency will need to send in the application form, social report and supporting documents to TS for assessment.

To find the FSC in your neighbourhood, call Comcare hotline at 1800 222 0000 or visit 
https://www.msf.gov.sg/our-services/directories.

Information last updated on 22 Oct 2025
